items.html: Above, in the first discernment, we clarified how the woman ascends with her husband and does not descend, and how she left her root permanently in the whole middle line of ZA [Zeir Anpin], and even above, in the Daat in him. We have already clarified all the rest. Now, in this fourth discernment, she rose up to the Daat and left her root there forever. The matter is that by now there had already been the second Ibur [conception] of ZA, to make Mochin [minds] for him. And it is known that from the two upper joints of the Tifferet in him the discernment of the Daat in him was made, as is clarified in its place. It follows that when the discernment of the Tifferet rose and became Daat, she too, who was behind the Tifferet, rose with it, and she is found standing behind the Daat. Afterwards a complete Partzuf was made of her, as will be written, God willing. From that root in the Daat, the Partzuf of Leah was made; and from the root in the Tifferet was made the Partzuf of the Nukva [female] of Zeir herself, called Rachel, as will be written, God willing.
